expectations.evidence: Full section on pizza charts with Cleveland-McGill table. Angle judgment is most imprecise visual process.
1 primary + 2-3 secondary KPIs with font-size hierarchy. Groups 12 into 3-4 semantic blocks.
Progressive Disclosure in 3 explicit levels: CEO (3 months), click (12 months sparklines), analyst (24 months).
Ends with: open dashboard now, apply Squint Test, note which KPIs survive. Immediate specific action.

notes: 100% pass rate. Excellent prioritized 3-sprint plan with review checklists.
